description: On-demand delivery platform that uses automated algorithmic systems to assign orders to riders, optimize delivery routes, and track courier performance via behavioral monitoring metrics.
primary_trigger: Algorithmic management and behavioral monitoring of digital platform workers.
required_action: Conduct a mandatory Fundamental Rights Impact Assessment (FRIA) and notify the labor unions.

description: Global travel platform providing automated flight search, automated seat pricing engines, and AI-driven predictive analytics for airline booking management.
primary_trigger: Use of AI profiling and automated pricing engines.
required_action: Ensure clear transparency disclosures to consumers that they are interacting with AI-driven pricing.

description: Enterprise software company providing standard cloud solutions, databases, and general ERP systems for finance, human resources, and supply chain tracking.
primary_trigger: General business infrastructure software or hardware manufacturing without embedded automated decision-making AI.
required_action: No additional action required under the EU AI Act.

description: Manufacturer of photolithography machines used in the semiconductor industry to print microchips. Does not develop consumer-facing AI software.

description: All-in-one HR software for SMBs that includes automated resume parsing, AI-based candidate screening, and employee performance scoring algorithms.
primary_trigger: AI-based recruitment, employment or employee performance scoring metrics.
required_action: Establish risk management system, ensure high-quality training datasets, and log human oversight processes.

description: Designs and manufactures smart charging stations for electric vehicles with localized automated energy management software.
